servicios.title: OUR SERVICES
servicios.heading: Technological
servicios.description: We offer a comprehensive approach to digitally transform your business with cutting-edge technologies.
servicios.service1Desc: Intelligent assistants with generative AI for customer support, 24/7 support and response automation.
servicios.service2Desc: Intelligent document processing with OCR and AI.
servicios.service4Desc: We automate your repetitive processes with cutting-edge technology.
servicios.service5Desc: Native and hybrid applications for iOS and Android.
servicios.service6Desc: We create modern, scalable, high-performance web applications.
servicios.service7Desc: Integration of systems and external services.
servicios.service8Desc: Strategic advisory to digitally transform your company.

proyectos.title: OUR PROJECTS
proyectos.heading: Success
proyectos.description: Projects that demonstrate our expertise in AI, automation and custom development.
proyectos.p1Desc: Complete automation of the invoicing process using UiPath and N8N. 80% reduction in processing time.
proyectos.p2Desc: Virtual assistant with natural language processing integrated to CRM. 40% increase in customer satisfaction.
proyectos.p3Desc: Online store with admin panel, real-time inventory and integrated payment gateways.
proyectos.p4Desc: Integration of multiple banking APIs for report automation and real-time bank reconciliation.

nosotros.title: ABOUT US
nosotros.heading: Meet
nosotros.description: We are a software engineering consultancy specializing in transforming businesses through Artificial Intelligence, Automation and custom development.
nosotros.historyP1: Subelza CG was born with the vision of democratizing access to advanced technologies like Artificial Intelligence and Process Automation (RPA).
nosotros.historyP2: During our 3+ years of trajectory, we have helped more than 50 companies transform their operations, reducing time and costs while improving their competitiveness.
nosotros.valuesMissionDesc: Digitally transform companies through innovative tech solutions.
nosotros.valuesVisionDesc: Be the reference consultancy in AI and automation.
nosotros.valuesTeamDesc: Specialized professionals with +3 years of experience.
nosotros.valuesCommitmentDesc: On-time delivery and premium quality in every project.
